title: agrostis alpina var. pyrenaea
intro: Agrostis alpina var. pyrenaea, also known as the Pyrenean bent grass, is a subspecies of perennial grass native to the Pyrenees mountains. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and wounds. The health benefits of Agrostis alpina var. pyrenaea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against infection. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
